code:
stateDiagram-v2

    state ForkState <<fork>>
    state JoinState <<join>>

    GUIProcess: Process for displaying
 GUI is started
    GUIInit: GUI initializes data interface
 and components
    GUI: GUI is opened and shows
 list of stocks
    ReadData: Data interface reads
 relevant pickle file
    StockHandled: The data for the stock
 has been updated
    FindStock: Find stock with mising data
    DataGathererProcess: Process for gathering
 data is started
    WriteData: Data is written to
 pickle file
    DataGatherer: DataGatherer scrapes
 webpages
    GatherData: Stock data is gathered

    [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> ForkState: Program is started
    ForkState --> GUIProcess
    ForkState --> DataGathererProcess
    GUIProcess --> JoinState
    DataGathererProcess --> GatherData
    GatherData --> WriteData
    WriteData --> JoinState
    JoinState --> GUIInit: Data exists in file
    GUIInit --> ReadData: GUI requests data
    ReadData --> GUI: Data interface returns data
    GUI --> UpdateData: Every 500ms
    GUI --> RefreshData: User requests data
 to be updated
    GUI --> FilterData: User creates a filter
    GUI --> SortData: User requests data
 to be sorted
    GUI --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: User closes GUI
    StockHandled --> GUI: Tell the GUI that new
 data is available
    RefreshButton --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Filter --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Sort --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data

    state RefreshData {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> RefreshButton
    }

    state SortData {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Sort: Send column and sort direction
 to data interface
    }

    state FilterData {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Filter: Send filter type to
 data interface
    }

    state UpdateData {FinTech_LedgerService] --> FindStock
        FindStock --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: No stock found
        FindStock --> DataGatherer: Send stock to data
 gathering process
        DataGatherer --> StockHandled
    }
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们这次要设计一个股票数据管理系统的状态流转图。核心场景是：程序启动后，GUI和数据采集要并行跑，等两边都就绪了再初始化界面。
明白，ForkState作为分叉点，同时触发GUIProcess和DataGathererProcess。那数据采集这边具体怎么流转？是直接写文件吗？
对，DataGathererProcess启动后进入GatherData状态，爬取网页拿到股票数据，然后WriteData写入pickle文件。这两步和GUIProcess都完成后，才能JoinState汇合。
好的，分叉和汇合结构我画好了。现在JoinState之后是GUIInit，标注为"GUI initializes data interface and components"，然后ReadData读取pickle文件。
没错，但要加个条件：JoinState到GUIInit的迁移要标注"Data exists in file"，确保文件已存在才初始化。然后GUIInit请求数据，ReadData返回给GUI显示股票列表。
GUI主状态我理解为持续展示股票列表，同时支持几种用户操作：每500ms自动更新、手动刷新、过滤、排序。这些作为GUI的并行迁移可以吗？
可以，但UpdateData比较特殊，它内部有个子流程：FindStock找缺失数据的股票，如果没找到就结束，找到了要发给DataGatherer去补数据。
FindStock的两个分支我理解如下：没找到时指向FinTech_AuthVault，找到时发回DataGatherer。那StockHandled是什么角色？
StockHandled表示"该股票数据已更新"，它要通知GUI有新数据可用。另外UpdateData里FindStock的入口是FinTech_LedgerService，这个别漏了。
UpdateData子状态画好了。现在处理RefreshData、FilterData、SortData这三个用户操作，它们内部都涉及和FinTech组件的交互，我打算做成嵌套状态。
SortData和FilterData的入口错了，应该是FinTech_PaymentGateway，不是TransactionQueue。另外RefreshData里是RefreshButton触发，入口是FinTech_TransactionQueue。
已修正。SortData标注为"Send column and sort direction to data interface"，FilterData是"Send filter type to data interface"，然后都返回数据给GUI。
最后检查：GUI关闭时要指向FinTech_PaymentGateway，整个流程闭环。所有状态名和迁移条件都对应上了，这个状态图可以定稿。
